records.title: footer Twitter link points to its Sauce Labs URL
records.acText: The footer Twitter link's href is https://twitter.com/saucelabs.

records.title: footer Facebook link points to its Sauce Labs URL
records.acText: The footer Facebook link's href is https://www.facebook.com/saucelabs.

records.acText: The footer shows '© 2026 Sauce Labs. All Rights Reserved. Terms of Service | Privacy Policy'.
